message:
refactor: Continue splitting runtime.zig into focused modules

Extract additional logical groups:
- type_name.zig (65 lines): pyTypeName, pyStrFromAny
- concat_repeat.zig (91 lines): concatRuntime, repeatRuntime, listRepeat
- int_convert.zig (91 lines): pyToInt, packInt

Also simplified containsGeneric to use container_ops.containsGeneric wrapper.

runtime.zig: 2153 → 1904 lines (another 249 lines extracted)
Total reduction from original: 2565 → 1904 lines (~26%)
